'''mochazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keerful|keerful]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keerful|keerful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mochazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochazhithi|mochazhithi]] || [[word:mochazhiji|mochazhiji]] || [[word:mochazhishi|mochazhishi]] || [[word:mochazhiki|mochazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochazhuthuthu|mochazhuthuthu]] || [[word:mochazhujuju|mochazhujuju]] || [[word:mochazhushushu|mochazhushushu]] || [[word:mochazhukuku|mochazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochazhuthu|mochazhuthu]] || [[word:mochazhuju|mochazhuju]] || [[word:mochazhushu|mochazhushu]] || [[word:mochazhuku|mochazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochazhufthuf|mochazhufthuf]] || [[word:mochazhufjuf|mochazhufjuf]] || [[word:mochazhufshuf|mochazhufshuf]] || [[word:mochazhufkuf|mochazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochazhethe|mochazhethe]] || [[word:mochazheje|mochazheje]] || [[word:mochazheshe|mochazheshe]] || [[word:mochazheke|mochazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochazhothotho|mochazhothotho]] || [[word:mochazhojojo|mochazhojojo]] || [[word:mochazhoshosho|mochazhoshosho]] || [[word:mochazhokoko|mochazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochazhotho|mochazhotho]] || [[word:mochazhojo|mochazhojo]] || [[word:mochazhosho|mochazhosho]] || [[word:mochazhoko|mochazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochazhofthof|mochazhofthof]] || [[word:mochazhofjof|mochazhofjof]] || [[word:mochazhofshof|mochazhofshof]] || [[word:mochazhofkof|mochazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfthĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfjĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfshĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfkĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfthĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfjĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfshĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfkĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfthĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfjĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfshĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochazhĂŻfkĂŻf|mochazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochazhĂŠthĂŠ|mochazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mochazhĂŠjĂŠ|mochazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mochazhĂŠshĂŠ|mochazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mochazhĂŠkĂŠ|mochazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochazhathatha|mochazhathatha]] || [[word:mochazhajaja|mochazhajaja]] || [[word:mochazhashasha|mochazhashasha]] || [[word:mochazhakaka|mochazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochazhatha|mochazhatha]] || [[word:mochazhaja|mochazhaja]] || [[word:mochazhasha|mochazhasha]] || [[word:mochazhaka|mochazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochazhafthaf|mochazhafthaf]] || [[word:mochazhafjaf|mochazhafjaf]] || [[word:mochazhafshaf|mochazhafshaf]] || [[word:mochazhafkaf|mochazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mochazhasha|mochazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochazhshĂ«sha|mochazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochazhrosha|mochazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochazhmusha|mochazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochazhyasha|mochazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochazhnkshĂ«sha|gomochazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochazhnkrosha|gomochazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochazhnkmusha|gomochazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochazhnkyasha|gomochazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mochachazhasha|mochachazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochachazhshĂ«sha|mochachazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochachazhrosha|mochachazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochachazhmusha|mochachazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochachazhyasha|mochachazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochachazhnkshĂ«sha|gomochachazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochachazhnkrosha|gomochachazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochachazhnkmusha|gomochachazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochachazhnkyasha|gomochachazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mechĂŠzhasha|mechĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mechĂŠzhshĂ«sha|mechĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mechĂŠzhrosha|mechĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mechĂŠzhmusha|mechĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mechĂŠzhyasha|mechĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomechĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gomechĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomechĂŠzhnkrosha|gomechĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomechĂŠzhnkmusha|gomechĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomechĂŠzhnkyasha|gomechĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mochfazhasha|mochfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochfazhshĂ«sha|mochfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochfazhrosha|mochfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochfazhmusha|mochfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochfazhyasha|mochfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochfazhnkshĂ«sha|gomochfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochfazhnkrosha|gomochfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochfazhnkmusha|gomochfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochfazhnkyasha|gomochfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
